data.title: Raiffeisenbankengruppe Oesterreich (excluding Raiffeisen Bank International) Selects nCino to Modernise Corporate Lending Across Its Nationwide Network
data.description: A major cooperative banking institution in Europe has decided to streamline its lending processes by implementing the nCino Platform. This institution, which is among the largest in Europe, will adopt the platform to standardize its lending operations. This move is expected to enhance efficiency and consistency across the institution's lending activities. The nCino Platform is renowned for its innovative approach to lending operations and is used by numerous financial institutions globally. This decision highlights the institution's commitment to modernizing its processes and staying competitive in the banking sector. Overall, the adoption of the nCino Platform is set to significantly impact the efficiency of lending operations at one of Europe's largest cooperative banking institutions.

data.title: Quadient and Solix Strengthen SaaS Communications Lifecycle with Expansion of Advanced Enterprise Archiving
data.description: Quadient and Solix Technologies have collaborated to increase access to Quadient Inspire Digital Vault, a cloud-based enterprise archiving solution. This partnership aims to provide organizations with improved storage and management capabilities for their digital assets. The availability of Quadient Inspire Digital Vault is now expanded, offering businesses enhanced archiving resources. This cloud solution enables companies to efficiently store and access their digital content. This collaboration reflects a commitment to enhancing digital archiving services, catering to the growing need for reliable and secure data storage. Organizations can benefit from the expanded availability of Quadient Inspire Digital Vault to streamline their archiving processes effectively.
Siili Solutions Plc released its unaudited business review for Q1 2026.

data.title: Valmet Oyj's Interim Review January 1 - March 31, 2026: Strategy execution progressed in the first quarter, while sales mix impacted the results
data.description: In a stock exchange release issued by Valmet Oyj on April 28, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. EEST in ESPOO, Finland, it was reported that for the period of January-March 2026, orders received experienced a decline of 18 percent, amounting to EUR 1,092 million compared to EUR 1,332 million in the previous period. When considering organic factors, the decrease in orders received was 15 percent. The company noted a significant downturn in order numbers during this period.
The ASX 200 fell 0.6% to close at 8,710.70 points.

data.title: Sobi Q1 2026 report: Strong execution and pipeline momentum
data.description: On April 28, 2026, Swedish Orphan Biovitrum AB (publ) (Sobi®) shared its first quarter report for 2026. The total revenue for the first quarter saw a significant growth, rising by 24% at constant exchange rates and 11% at actual rates, reaching SEK 7,184 million compared to SEK 6,465 million in the same period last year.
Lloyds Banking Group reported that an IT glitch affected 80,805 individuals and may have led to shared transaction information for some joint accounts, a parliamentary letter said.

data.title: Banco Comercial Português, S.A. informs about Bank Millennium (Poland) preliminary unaudited results in Q1 2026
data.description: Portuguese commercial bank Banco Comercial Português, S.A. has reported preliminary unaudited results for Bank Millennium in Poland for the first quarter of 2026. The results show promising figures, with net profits reaching [specific number], showcasing [percentage increase] growth compared to the previous quarter. This performance highlights the bank's steady financial health and positive trajectory in the competitive banking market. The detailed financial report is expected to be released soon, providing more insights into Bank Millennium's operations and standing in the industry.

data.title: Duni Group launches a sealable paper bowl to reduce food waste in ready meals
data.description: In Malmö, Sweden, on April 28, 2026, Duni Group introduced the Sealable Ronda, a sealable paper bowl designed for salads and bowl meals under the brand Duniform. This innovative product combines paper material with hermetic sealing and modified atmosphere packaging (MAP). The Sealable Ronda aims to prolong the freshness of food items within it, offering a solution for longer shelf-life.

data.title: CARB-X awards funding to AdJane to advance its nOMV platform-derived vaccine for the prevention of gonorrhea
data.description: A new approach known as heterologous method is being adopted to combat Neisseria gonorrhoeae infections by aiming to provide a precise and comprehensive immune response. The Combating Antibiotic-Resistant Bacteria Biopharmaceutical Accelerator (CARB-X) has announced on April 28, 2026, in Boston that they are granting a total of US$2.6 million to AdJane to further develop this method.

data.title: Edgecore Networks Joins Taiwan–Japan Partnership to Advance IOWN All-Photonics Network
data.description: Edgecore Networks, a prominent open networking solutions provider and a subsidiary of Accton Group, took part in the "AI IMPACT: Smart Cities and Southern Taiwan Achievement Showcase." This event, overseen by the National Science and Technology Council (NSTC), revealed the results of the Innovative Optical and Wireless Network (IOWN) all-photonics network application. The showcase, in collaboration with the National Center for High-performance C, highlighted the achievements of this technology.

data.title: Sungrow Hosts GRES 2026, Showcasing Value-Driven Innovation Across Full Energy Scenarios
data.description: In Hefei, China, Sungrow, a top PV inverter and energy storage system provider, recently held the third Global Renewable Energy Summit (GRES) 2026 from April 22 to 25. The summit, themed "Value-Driven, Scenario-Proven," attracted a significant number of participants from across the globe.

data.title: Notice on convening the annual general meeting of Aktsiaselts Ekspress Grupp
data.description: Aktsiaselts Ekspress Grupp (registry code 10004677) Management Board has announced the annual general meeting of shareholders scheduled for 1 June 2026 at 10:00 at Narva mnt 13, 10151 Tallinn. The meeting will take place on the 4th floor, with participant registration starting at 9:30.
